DT_StoryLevels.1.GoalDescription: 1st step : Get out of the ruins
DT_StoryLevels.4.GoalDescription: 4th step : Find a way to the middle layer
DT_StoryLevels.6.GoalDescription: 6th step : Climb to the middle layer
DT_StoryLevels.7.GoalDescription: 7th step : Find a way to the upper layer
DT_StoryLevels.8.GoalDescription: 9th step : Open the way to the upper layer

ST_Common.EA_CAN_NOT_PROCEED:
Can not continue this route in the current early access version.
Please look forward to future updates.
ST_Common.EA_NOT_IMPLEMENTED: Not implemented in early access version.

ST_Difficulty.CURRENCY_BONUS_TEXT:
Currency bonus applied from difficulty settings.
Using harder difficulty settings
will grant more currency.
ST_Difficulty.TITLE: Difficulty settings
ST_Difficulty.SETTINGS_ENEMY_NO_LEAD_FX_EXPLANATION: Disable the visual effect indicating an incoming attack
ST_Difficulty.SETTINGS_PLAYER_INSTANT_KILL_EXPLANATION: Kill the player in one hit
ST_Difficulty.SETTINGS_ENEMY_ACTION_FREQUENCY_EXPLANAT:
The factor deciding how aggressive enemies are.
The higher the number, the faster enemies attack
ST_Difficulty.SETTINGS_ENEMY_STAMINA_FACTOR_EXPLANATIO:
The factor to apply to enemies max stamina (resistance to stun and status effects).
The higher the number, the harder it is to stun and apply status effects.
ST_Difficulty.SETTINGS_ENEMY_ATTACK_FACTOR_EXPLANATION:
The factor to apply to enemies' attack value.
The higher the number, the higher the damage.
ST_Difficulty.SETTINGS_ENEMY_MAX_HP_FACTOR_EXPLANATION:
The factor to apply to enemies' max HP.
The higher the number, the higher the HP
ST_Difficulty.SETTINGS_ENEMY_STAMINA_RECOVERY_SPEED_FA:
The factor to apply to enemies' stamina recovery speed (recovery from stun and status effects).
The higher the number, the faster the recovery.

ST_Settings.SETTINGS_GAMMA_MESSAGE: Adjust gamma to your desired level
ST_Settings.SETTINGS_VIDEO_RESOLUTIONSCALE_EXPLANATI: Adjust the internal resolution scale. Higher is visually better, but more resource intensive.
ST_Settings.SETTINGS_VIDEO_RESOLUTION_EXPLANATION: Adjust the resolution of the application
ST_Settings.SETTINGS_INIT_UPLOAD_CRASH_MESSAGE:
Allow automatic upload of crash report in the event of a crash?

This will only contains non personally identifiable information,
but may contains information about your system
such as hardware vendor, graphic driver version, etc...

This setting can be changed at any time in the settings.
ST_Settings.SETTINGS_VIDEO_BUTTON_APPLY_EXPLANATION: Apply resolution and screen mode settings.
ST_Settings.SETTINGS_BUTTON_REVERT_TO_DEFAULT_DIALOG: Are you sure you want to reset these settings to their default values ?
ST_Settings.SETTINGS_GAME_AUTOSKIP_ALREADY_SEEN_EVEN: Automatically skip events that have already been seen.
ST_Settings.SETTINGS_GAMEPAD_NO_GAMEPAD_CONNECTED_EX: Connect a PS gamepad to access gamepad settings.
Connect a Switch gamepad to access gamepad settings.
Connect a gamepad to access gamepad settings.
ST_Settings.SETTINGS_BINDING_GAMEPAD_EXPLANATION: Customize the binding of the selected action.
ST_Settings.SETTINGS_BINDING_KEYBOARD_EXPLANATION: Customize the binding of the selected action.
ST_Settings.SETTINGS_VIDEO_VSYNC_EXPLANATION: Enable VSync to reduce screen tearing, but FPS will be limited by the screen's refresh rate
ST_Settings.SETTINGS_VIDEO_FPSLIMIT_EXPLANATION: Enable or disable the Frame Per Second limiter, used to limit resource usage.
ST_Settings.SETTINGS_GAME_AUTOUPLOAD_CRASH_REPORT_EX: Enable or disable the automatic upload of crash data. No personal information are sent.
ST_Settings.SETTINGS_GAME_CAMERA_OSCILLATION_EXPLANA: Enable or disable the constant camera sway.
ST_Settings.SETTINGS_GAME_DISPLAY_DAMAGE_VALUES_EXPL: Enable or disable the display of damage values on the screen.
ST_Settings.SETTINGS_GAME_DISPLAY_HEAL_VALUES_EXPLAN: Enable or disable the display of heal values on the screen.
ST_Settings.SETTINGS_GAME_DISPLAY_ENEMY_GAUGES_EXPLA: Enable or disable the display of the HP and stamina gauges above enemies.
ST_Settings.SETTINGS_GAME_DISPLAY_HP_TEXT_ABOVE_GAUG: Enable or disable the display of the current HP value above the HP gauge of the player.
ST_Settings.SETTINGS_GAME_DISPLAY_SP_TEXT_ABOVE_GAUG: Enable or disable the display of the current SP value above the SP gauge of the player.
ST_Settings.SETTINGS_GAME_DISPLAY_ACHIEVEMENT_NOTIFI: Enable or disable the display of the in-game achievement notifications on the screen.
Enable or disable the display of the in-game trophy notifications on the screen.
Enable or disable the display of the medal notifications on the screen.
ST_Settings.SETTINGS_GAME_DISPLAY_PLAYER_UI_EXPLANAT: Enable or disable the display of the player HUD in game.
ST_Settings.SETTINGS_GAME_DISPLAY_TUTORIALS_EXPLANAT: Enable or disable the display of tutorial dialogs. Tutorials can still be checked from the game menu.
ST_Settings.SETTINGS_BUTTON_REVERT_TO_DEFAULT_VIDEO_: Revert the settings on this page to their default values, except screen mode / resolution settings.
ST_Settings.SETTINGS_BUTTON_REVERT_TO_DEFAULT_EXPLAN: Revert the settings on this page to their default values.
ST_Settings.SETTINGS_VIDEO_ASPECTRATIO_EXPLANATION: Set the aspect ratio constraint to use. While the game is optimized for 16:9, other aspect ratio can be used.
ST_Settings.SETTINGS_AUDIO_MASTER_EXPLANATION: Set the global volume, affecting all sounds.
ST_Settings.SETTINGS_INPUT_STICKDEADZONE_LEFT_EXPLAN: Set the inactive area of the PS controller's left stick
ST_Settings.SETTINGS_INPUT_STICKDEADZONE_RIGHT_EXPLA: Set the inactive area of the PS controller's right stick
ST_Settings.SETTINGS_INPUT_STICKDEADZONE_LEFT_EXPLAN: Set the inactive area of the PS5 controller's left stick
ST_Settings.SETTINGS_INPUT_STICKDEADZONE_RIGHT_EXPLA: Set the inactive area of the PS5 controller's right stick
ST_Settings.SETTINGS_INPUT_STICKDEADZONE_LEFT_EXPLAN: Set the inactive area of the SW controller's left stick
ST_Settings.SETTINGS_INPUT_STICKDEADZONE_RIGHT_EXPLA: Set the inactive area of the SW controller's right stick
ST_Settings.SETTINGS_INPUT_STICKDEADZONE_LEFT_EXPLAN: Set the inactive area of the controller's left stick
ST_Settings.SETTINGS_INPUT_STICKDEADZONE_RIGHT_EXPLA: Set the inactive area of the controller's right stick
ST_Settings.SETTINGS_LANGUAGE_TEXT_EXPLANATION: Set the language for all texts
ST_Settings.SETTINGS_LANGUAGE_VOICE_EXPLANATION: Set the language for all voices
ST_Settings.SETTINGS_VIDEO_FPS_EXPLANATION: Set the maximum FPS value to use as limit.
ST_Settings.SETTINGS_GAME_DISPLAY_LOW_HP_FEEDBACK_OP: Set the opacity of the fullscreen low HP feedback.
ST_Settings.SETTINGS_VIDEO_POSTPROCESSQUALITY_EXPLAN: Set the quality of the post process effects. Higher is visually better, but more resource intensive.
ST_Settings.SETTINGS_VIDEO_EFFECTSQUALITY_EXPLANATIO: Set the quality of the visual effects. Higher is visually better, but more resource intensive.
ST_Settings.SETTINGS_VIDEO_SCREENMODE_EXPLANATION: Set the screen mode of the application.
ST_Settings.SETTINGS_GAMEPAD_VIBRATION_EXPLANATION_P: Set the strength of PS controller's vibration. 0% to disable, 100% for full effect.
ST_Settings.SETTINGS_GAMEPAD_VIBRATION_EXPLANATION_S: Set the strength of SW controller's vibration. 0% to disable, 100% for full effect.
ST_Settings.SETTINGS_GAME_CAMERA_SHAKE_EXPLANATION: Set the strength of camera shakes. 0% to disable, 100% for full effect.
ST_Settings.SETTINGS_GAMEPAD_VIBRATION_EXPLANATION: Set the strength of controller's vibration. 0% to disable, 100% for full effect.
ST_Settings.SETTINGS_GAMEPAD_INPUTSTYLE_EXPLANATION: Set the type of buttons to display when using a gamepad.
ST_Settings.SETTINGS_GAMEPAD_INPUTSTYLE_EXPLANATION_: Set the type of buttons to display when using a gamepad.
Set the type of buttons to display when using a gamepad.
ST_Settings.SETTINGS_AUDIO_VOICE_EXPLANATION: Set the volume of all voices.
ST_Settings.SETTINGS_AUDIO_AMBIENT_EXPLANATION: Set the volume of ambient sounds such as rain and wind.
ST_Settings.SETTINGS_AUDIO_UI_EXPLANATION: Set the volume of the UI sound effects such as menu confirmation.
ST_Settings.SETTINGS_AUDIO_BGM_EXPLANATION: Set the volume of the background music.
ST_Settings.SETTINGS_AUDIO_SE_EXPLANATION: Set the volume of the in-game sound effects such as attacks and steps.
ST_Settings.SETTINGS_VIDEO_ANTIALIASING_QUALITY_EXPL: The quality of the selected AntiAliasing. Higher is visually better, but more resource intensive.
ST_Settings.SETTINGS_VIDEO_ANTIALIASING_TYPE_EXPLANA: The type of anti aliasing to use. Generally, MSAA is heavier than FXAA that is heavier than None.
ST_Settings.SETTINGS_GAME_AUTOCLIMB_DIRECTION_MODE_E: The valid directions to trigger an auto climb.
ST_Settings.SETTINGS_GAME_DOWN_FOR_DODGE_ACTION_EXPL: When enabled, alternate dodge action can only be executed while pressing down.
ST_Settings.SETTINGS_VIDEO_CONSTRAINT_HUD_ASPECTRATI: When enabled, limit the HUD aspect ratio to 16:9, bringing HUD elements closer to the center of the screen on wide displays.
